  • Classes in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models used by edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation
    Class
    Description
    AutomationRule
    Represents a user-defined automation rule.
    DeviceEvent
    Represents an event emitted by an input-type edge device (e.g., motion sensor, doorbell, light sensor).

    Class
    Description
    AutomationRule
    Represents a user-defined automation rule.
    AutomationRuleMessage
    Payload for messages published to the TopicType.AUTOMATION topic.
    Command
    Represents a command issued to an edge device.
    Device
    Represents a registered smart home edge device.

    AutomationRule
    Represents a user-defined automation rule.
